title: The Match Strikes Itself
provenance: This is the sound of something that refused to bend finally breaking — not into pieces, but into light. The old structure burns from the inside out, and what emerges has no name yet.
threshold_note: Between who you were forced to be and who you're about to become, there's this exact second of pure combustion.
collector_meaning: You hold the moment when pretending stops working. When the cost of staying becomes higher than the cost of burning.
